classification.attack_type: Authorization Bypass — Missing canView() in Admin UI flow summary mapper
classification.novel_sub_variant_description: Original CVE-2026-11986 was role assign/unassign asymmetry; this is missing canView() on Admin UI aggregation endpoint — same Class 10 root cause, different code surface

signals.confirmation_signal: HTTP 200 on GET /ui-ext/authentication-management/flows returns hidden client ID in usedBy.values (SPECIFIC_CLIENTS) to view-realm-only actor; direct GET /clients/{id} correctly returns 403 for same actor

retrieval_summary.summary: Information disclosure via Admin UI flow summary endpoint: view-realm-only delegated admin enumerates hidden client IDs from usedBy.values in /ui-ext/authentication-management/flows. Missing auth.clients().canView(client) guard in flow summary mapper. Confirmed on Keycloak 26.2.5. Novel sub-variant of FGAP authorization asymmetry (Class 10).
